operational_boundaries.control_reason: Whodunnit entities are per-entity diagnostic attribution sensors: each records what and who last caused a monitored entity to change. They are observe-only (there is nothing to actuate), so an agent should read them but never attempt to control them.

privacy_classification.privacy_note: Each sensor records who (person name and Home Assistant user id) and what (automation, script, scene, dashboard, physical press, or service) changed a monitored entity, plus a rolling 25-event history. This is attribution and activity data about household members; treat reads as sensitive.
